extension.news: v. 1.0.16 "Cartographer" - 2026-07-09 - **New Sites**: Added 12 full-length tubes — AnyPorn, WhoresHub, Fuqster, FreeonesTube, PornKTube, CollectionOfBestPorn, YourLust, XXBrits, PornXP, Sextu, Neporn and YouPerv — each with categories, search, sorting/pagination and proxied playback, and each vetted (front-page duration histogram plus ffprobe spot-checks) for full videos rather than truncated preview clips. - **Site Fixes**: ThisVid (proxied expiring streams for smoother seeking), Fapality (category routes and parsing), InXXX (pagination and thumbnail headers), XFreeHD (search type), LuxureTV (restored listings/search/categories/thumbnails), 85po (protected-artwork proxy), CamCaps (moved to camcaps.io), LetMeJerk (moved to letmejizz.co) and SpankBang (cloudscraper for the stricter regional bot-check). - **Removed Smutr**: The site went offline; removed its module, logo and setting. - **Cloudscraper**: Fixed the challenge-math interpreter for Python 3.12+ (removed `ast.Num`) and replaced the PyParsing dependency with a small built-in parser. - **Global Search**: Fixed cross-search cache bleed and search-scope restore from history, cached search state for performance, and migrated the obsolete "1.0.12 New Sites" preset to Balanced Top Sites. - **Performance**: Added a six-hour repository-metadata cache and a single indexed logo-directory read for faster startup and navigation. - **Bug Fixes**: Fixed missing imports in WatchPorn and OK.xxx and a Cloudflare-fallback `NameError` in PunishWorld and DarknessPorn. - **Maintenance**: Losslessly re-encoded oversized logos, moved routine proxy diagnostics to debug level, removed dead code and unused imports, increased proxy read patience for slow CDNs, and release builds verify their bundled hash manifest.
extension.description:
Internet [COLOR red]XXX Porn Video[COLOR white] Streams.
[COLOR red][B]WARNING:[/B][COLOR red]Only for adults[/COLOR]
[COLOR white]AdultHideout does not host third-party videos on its own servers and is not affiliated with the websites supported by the addon. Content, streams and metadata are provided by third-party websites.[/COLOR]
[COLOR white]Github: https://github.com/Vashiel/repository.adulthideout [/COLOR]
extension.disclaimer: AdultHideout does not host third-party videos on its own servers and is not affiliated with the websites supported by the addon. Content, streams and metadata are provided by third-party websites.

extension.description: Hosts AdultHideout v1.0.0 “Jubilee” – complete refactor, six new adapters, cleaned-up codebase and legacy removal.
